purpose_quote: Control-plane site: readiness board + journal browser… check every repo's working quality and progress by looking

playwright.reason: Chromium (build 1194) launches, but every page.goto fails with net::ERR_CONNECTION_RESET through the agent MITM proxy (HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:37729) even with --proxy-server + --ignore-certificate-errors + background-networking disabled. Playwright's own bundled browser (build 1228 chrome-headless-shell) is absent and `playwright install` is disallowed. Pages are server-rendered no-JS FastAPI/Jinja2, so the two stdlib passes capture the full nav graph; console_errors left [].
